import Render from '../../components/react/Render.astro';
import RenderFn from '../../components/react/RenderFn.astro';
import RenderArgs from '../../components/react/RenderArgs.astro';

# Slots: MDX

<Render id="render">render</Render>
<RenderFn id="render-fn">{() => "render-fn"}</RenderFn>
<RenderArgs id="render-args" text="render-args">{(text) => <span>{text}</span>}</RenderArgs>
